bird.summary: The tepui wren (Troglodytes rufulus) is a species of bird in the family Troglodytidae. It is found in Brazil, Guyana, and Venezuela, where…

locations.name: 巴西

locations.name: 圭亚那

relations.subject: Tepui wren
relations.evidence: marahuacae, central Amazonas state, southern Venezuela The tepui wren inhabits humid forest, forest edges, and bushland on isolated flat-topped mountains called tepuis
